stemHtml: After take-off the aircraft at 6 000 ft wants to contact a ground station. What ground stations is it most likely to get in contact with?

options.a: Ground station at 150 ft, distance 130 NM.
options.b: Ground station at 350 ft, distance 140 NM.
options.c: Ground station at 550 ft, distance 120 NM.
options.d: Ground station at 800 ft, distance 150 NM.
